memberdef.argsstring: (self, np.ndarray image, int page_number, str language, str table_type)
memberdef.name: extract_onepage_tables_from_image

briefdescription.para: extracts tables from input image :param image: input gray image :param page_number: :param language: language for Tesseract :return: List[ScanTable]
Function builds matrix table from sorted cells of the tree table :param table_tree: tree of cells.
Parsing all tables that exist in the tables_tree.
